questions.question: Starting from the red ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first red ball.
questions.answer: The red ball drops from the red hopper at (8,-1), rolls onto the fixed ramp_left at (7,1), continues to ramp_left at (6,2), ramp_right at (5,3), then solution ramps: ramp_right at (6,3), ramp_right at (5,4), ramp_right at (4,5), ramp_left at (3,6), ramp_left at (2,7), ramp_left at (1,8), ramp_right at (2,9), ramp_right at (3,10), reaching the left lever.

questions.question: Which lever does the first red ball trigger and what color ball is released next?
questions.answer: The first red ball triggers the left lever, releasing a blue ball.

questions.question: How many balls total are released and in what order?
questions.answer: One red ball is released first, followed by 8 blue balls.
